subcodes.first_line: O thou who chantest the verses of sacrifice in remembrance of him who was martyred in the path of God, to whom the spirits of those near unto Him offer their devotion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من یرتل ایات الفدآء فی ذکر من استشهد فی سبیل الله روح المقربین له الفدآء
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam
